testsuite.name: UI, Functional, and Data-Driven Automation Tests

testcase.name: verifyHeaderMenusContent

failure.message: CRITICAL DEFECT [HP_005]: 'Add Recipe' option is not available on the homepage. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: CRITICAL DEFECT [HP_005]: 'Add Recipe' option is not available on the homepage. expected [true] but found [false] at tests.HomeTest.verifyHeaderMenusContent(HomeTest.java:49) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: verifyActiveMenuHighlighting

failure.message: VISUAL DEFECT [HP_006]: Menu item does not appear highlighted when active. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: VISUAL DEFECT [HP_006]: Menu item does not appear highlighted when active. expected [true] but found [false] at tests.HomeTest.verifyActiveMenuHighlighting(HomeTest.java:57) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: verifyHomepageContentSectionsAndLinks

failure.message: Featured recipes section is missing. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Featured recipes section is missing. expected [false] but found [true] at tests.HomeTest.verifyHomepageContentSectionsAndLinks(HomeTest.java:99) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: verifyHomepageScrollingAccessibility

failure.message: USER EXPERIENCE DEFECT [HP_014]: Homepage requires unnecessary scrolling before users can view primary content. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: USER EXPERIENCE DEFECT [HP_014]: Homepage requires unnecessary scrolling before users can view primary content. expected [false] but found [true] at tests.HomeTest.verifyHomepageScrollingAccessibility(HomeTest.java:126) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

failure.message: DEFECT [TC_LR_002]: Register/Create Account option is not visible or accessible on the homepage. expected [true] but found [false]

Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: verifySuggestions

failure.message: FAIL: Autocomplete suggestions did not drop down. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: FAIL: Autocomplete suggestions did not drop down. expected [true] but found [false] at tests.SearchTest.verifySuggestions(SearchTest.java:93) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: verifyBrokenImages

failure.message: Broken content images found on results page. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Broken content images found on results page. expected [true] but found [false] at tests.SearchTest.verifyBrokenImages(SearchTest.java:108) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

failure.message: Broken content hyperlinks found on results page. expected [true] but found [false]

failure.message: Mobile Responsiveness Error: Form elements vanished or compressed out of viewport boundaries! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Mobile Responsiveness Error: Form elements vanished or compressed out of viewport boundaries! expected [true] but found [false] at tests.SweepstakesTest.testMobileResponsivenessBreakpointScaling(SweepstakesTest.java:153) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: verifySearchBar

failure.message: Search bar element was not visible on the webpage context. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Search bar element was not visible on the webpage context. expected [true] but found [false] at tests.MyRecipesTest.verifySearchBar(MyRecipesTest.java:32) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

failure.message: Login navigation target element was missing. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Login navigation target element was missing. expected [true] but found [false] at tests.MyRecipesTest.verifyLoginButton(MyRecipesTest.java:37) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: verifyRecipeSearch

Removed 27 stack frames
